description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a matte black metal slide and frame, complemented by textured brown grip panels. The grip features a checkered pattern for enhanced handling, and the frame includes a visible trigger guard and hammer. The slide is smooth with minimal visible markings, and the barrel is of standard length, protruding slightly from the front. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, with no visible extensions or finger rests. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on function and durability, typical of classic service pistols.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with textured brown grips, a flat magazine base, and a smooth, unmarked slide.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, checkered brown grip, trigger, and hammer.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the width of the slide, rear sight, and the top of the grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip texture, slide, and trigger guard.
description_view_3: Front view showing the barrel opening, front sight, and the muzzle profile.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is rectangular with rounded edges and features a pronounced checkered pattern for improved traction. It appears to be made of a dark brown material, possibly wood or textured polymer, and is secured with visible screws. The surface is slightly contoured to fit the hand, with no visible finger grooves or logos, providing a classic and functional appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and of medium thickness, forming a smooth curve around the trigger area. It lacks any undercuts or squared-off edges, and there are no visible reinforcements or accessory rails. The design is simple and traditional, prioritizing comfort and accessibility.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, with a smooth, non-threaded profile and no visible compensators or porting. The muzzle is slightly recessed within the slide, and the exterior finish matches the matte black of the slide. No external markings or special features are visible on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, lacking manufacturer logos, model names, or caliber designations.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no extensions, flares, or finger rests. It has a simple, utilitarian design with no visible logos or texturing, maintaining a streamlined profile.
